option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
version: '3.8'
services: postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: skillock-db environment: POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres POSTGRES_DB: skillock_dev ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data networks: - skillock-network healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
volumes: postgres_data:
networks: skillock-network: driver: bridge
